# PLAN: {MISSION_ID}

## Meeting Brief
- Meeting URL: capture the live meeting link before execution.
- Participants: record the attendee list and role boundary.
- Agenda: list the agenda items that will be facilitated.

## Expected Outputs
- `minutes.md`: concise meeting summary with decisions and open questions.
- `action-items.jsonl`: structured follow-up items for ownership and tracking.
- Delivery pack: the compiled artifacts needed for downstream handoff.

## Execution Notes
- Keep the flow aligned to the meeting facilitator workflow.
- Preserve the live facilitation boundary before self-execution and team tracking.
